notes.heading: Daily maintenance
notes.body: The Backups page can now schedule one daily backup followed by the normal no-validate server update workflow.

notes.heading: Retention still applies
notes.body: Scheduled backups use the same backup retention setting, so old backups are pruned just like manual backups.

notes.heading: Restart after updates
notes.body: If Dragonwilds was running before the scheduled update, the app restarts it after SteamCMD finishes.
